evals.prompt: I need a message board where anyone can post messages. Write the Move code for Sui.
expectations: Code compiles with sui move build
Board object is shared using transfer::share_object or transfer::public_share_object
Messages are stored in a collection (vector, Table, etc.)
Post function takes the board by mutable reference (&mut)

evals.prompt: I'm building a game where players have an inventory that can hold different types of items (swords, shields, potions). How should I model this in Move on Sui?
expectations: Code compiles with sui move build
Uses dynamic fields or dynamic object fields for heterogeneous storage
Add and remove functions use generic type parameters for items

evals.prompt: I want to build a lockbox that wraps another object inside it. The owner can lock an item and later unlock it to get the item back. Write the Move module.
expectations: Code compiles with sui move build
Item is stored as a direct field inside the Lockbox struct (wrapping pattern)
Unlock function takes Lockbox by value, unpacks it, and returns the inner item
Lockbox UID is deleted when unlocking
